items.expected_agent_utterance: Hi Sir/Madam, Gm/Ga/Ge I am _____ from adventure team on Mahindra & Mahindra.
items.retrieval_query: Greet customer politely, say hello, good morning, or introduce yourself
items.source_quote: Introduction Hi Sir/Madam, Gm/Ga/Ge I am _____ from adventure team on Mahindra & Mahindra.

items.item_text: Explain the purpose and duration of the call
items.expected_agent_utterance: We are conducting a short feedback exercise to understand customer preferences for Adventure experiences. This will help us improve future events. The call will take about 8–10 minutes. Your responses will be kept confidential and used only for analysis purposes.
items.retrieval_query: Explain call purpose as feedback or survey and mention call duration
items.source_quote: We are conducting a short feedback exercise to understand customer preferences for Adventure experiences. This will help us improve future events. The call will take about 8–10 minutes. Your responses will be kept confidential and used only for analysis purposes.

items.expected_agent_utterance: Sir/Mam, we would start with your basic info, Age Profession How many people are there in your family Which vehicle/vehicles do you own?
items.retrieval_query: Ask for customer's basic info like age, profession, family size, and vehicles owned
items.source_quote: Sir/Mam, we would start with your basic info, Age Profession How many people are there in your family Which vehicle/vehicles do you own?

items.item_text: Ask when customer last took part in an Adventure activity and which event
items.expected_agent_utterance: When was the last time you took part in a Mahindra Adventure activity? And which event was it?
items.retrieval_query: Ask when last participated in adventure activity and which event it was
items.source_quote: When was the last time you took part in a Mahindra Adventure activity? And which event was it?

items.item_text: Ask how customer first heard about the event
items.expected_agent_utterance: How did you first hear about this event?
items.retrieval_query: Ask how customer first heard about the adventure event or program
items.source_quote: How did you first hear about this event? (Allow spontaneous response. If needed, probe later: Instagram, Facebook, Google, Thrillophilia, a friend, Mahindra communication, or something else.)

items.item_text: Ask what made customer interested enough to subscribe/book the event
items.expected_agent_utterance: What made you feel interested enough to subscribe/book this Adventure event?
items.retrieval_query: Ask what interested customer enough to book or subscribe to the event
items.source_quote: What made you feel interested enough to subscribe/book this Adventure event? (Allow spontaneous response. If only one reason mentioned, then ask for more and later probe on below pointers)

items.item_text: Ask if customer checked out other outdoor experiences before booking
items.expected_agent_utterance: Before booking Mahindra Adventure, did you check out any other outdoor experiences? (Yes/No)
items.retrieval_query: Ask if customer checked other outdoor experiences before booking this one
items.source_quote: It was an off roading activity. Before booking Mahindra Adventure, did you check out any other outdoor experiences? (Yes/No)

items.item_text: If Yes, ask which other outdoor experiences and where heard about them
items.expected_agent_utterance: Which other ones, did you look at? And where did you hear about these other outdoor events?
items.retrieval_query: If yes, ask which other outdoor experiences and where they heard about them
items.condition_text: Proceed if customer answers Yes to checking other outdoor experiences
items.condition_source_item_hint: Ask if customer checked out other outdoor experiences before booking
items.source_quote: If Yes: Which other ones, did you look at? And where did you hear about these other outdoor events? (Allow spontaneous response first, then probe with the same list: Instagram, Facebook, Google, Thrillophilia, friend, Mahindra communication, or others.)

items.item_text: Ask who influenced customer's decision the most
items.expected_agent_utterance: While you were exploring and deciding, who influenced your decision the most? Was it you, your spouse, kids, friends, or someone else?
items.retrieval_query: Ask who influenced customer's decision most like self, spouse, kids, or friends
items.source_quote: While you were exploring and deciding, who influenced your decision the most? Was it you, your spouse, kids, friends, or someone else?

items.item_text: Ask how early customer wants to be informed before an adventure event
items.expected_agent_utterance: According to you, how early should we inform you before an adventure event?
items.retrieval_query: Ask how early customer wants to be informed before an adventure event
items.source_quote: According to you, how early should we inform you before an adventure event?

items.item_text: Probe subscription timing if initial response is unclear
items.expected_agent_utterance: Was it less than 1 week, 1-2 weeks, 2-4 weeks, 1-2 months, or more than 2 months ago?
items.retrieval_query: Probe subscription timing: less than 1 week, 1-2 weeks, 2-4 weeks, or more
items.source_quote: Allow spontaneous response first, then probe Less than 1 week

items.item_text: Ask what would make the customer more likely to subscribe again
items.expected_agent_utterance: What is the one thing that would make you more likely to subscribe to our adventure events in the future again?
items.expected_intent: Identify factors to increase future subscription likelihood
items.retrieval_query: Ask what would make customer more likely to subscribe to future adventure events
items.source_quote: What is the one thing that would make you more likely to subscribe to our adventure events in the future again?
